sourcingNotes.poolAssessment: HONEST BLOCKER. Wikimedia Commons has only 5 files in Category:Red_Hill,_Victoria — all are village infrastructure (General Store, Public Hall, Recreation Reserve, Rail Trail, Uniting Church). None are market/produce images. The Red Hill Community Market does not have a dedicated Commons category. No market-specific imagery exists in any searched Commons category (Mornington Peninsula, Red Hill Victoria).
sourcingNotes.searchApproach: Commons API — Category:Red_Hill,_Victoria (5 files, none market-related). DuckDuckGo search for Wikimedia Commons Red Hill Market Victoria returned zero Commons results. No Pexels or Unsplash direct URL retrieval possible due to anti-bot protection.
sourcingNotes.blocker: No market-specific imagery available from Wikimedia Commons. Unsplash/Pexels anti-bot protection blocks programmatic sourcing of categorical market images. Visit Victoria Content Hub not yet registered.
recommendedUnblockPath: A — Visit Victoria Content Hub registration (likely has Red Hill Market coverage)
B — Unsplash API access for categorical farmers-market imagery
C — Manual James-provided Unsplash/Pexels URLs for market/produce shots
D — Red Hill Community Market website or Hill & Ridge Community Market media (requires outreach verification)

editorActionsRequested.question: No Wikimedia Commons market imagery exists for Red Hill. This slot needs one of: Visit Victoria Content Hub, Unsplash API access, or manual URL provision. Alternatively defer to Phase 2.
editorActionsRequested.defaultIfNoReply: Defer to Phase 2 and keep fog placeholder.
